positive: A stylized and whimsical geometric mandala pattern featuring interconnected elements like celestial bodies, crystalline formations, stylized animals (such as owls and ravens), and flowing organic shapes. The composition must be highly symmetrical and centralized, designed for apparel printing. Use a limited, striking color palette of deep indigo, antique gold, burnt orange, and cream. The style should be a blend of Art Deco symmetry, contemporary abstract geometry, and detailed illustrative etching. Ensure clean, sharp lines and solid color blocks for excellent print transfer. Minimal background texture, high contrast, vector art quality, isolated design.
negative: blur, watermark, signature, text, low resolution, cropped, dirty, grain, noise, artifact, extra limbs, bad anatomy, asymmetrical, gradient fill, photography, photo-realistic, realism
